name: ComplianceAuditWriter

ironRules.rule: retentionExpiresAt computed at write time from FREEDOM config key flow19_compliance_retention_days — NEVER hardcoded, NEVER deferred to batch job. CF-19-3.
auditHash = SHA-256([tenantId, sagaId, eventType, writtenAt].join(':')) — deterministic tamper-detection fingerprint on every record. CF-19-3.
ONLY storeDocument on xiigen-compliance-records — updateDocument and deleteDocument are BUILD_FAILURE violations on this index. Append-only. CF-19-3.
storeDocument at ORDER 3 BEFORE enqueue(ComplianceRecordWritten) at ORDER 4 — DNA-8.
knowledgeScope: PLATFORM_ONLY on all compliance records — inaccessible to tenant-scoped fabric queries. CF-19-3.

keywords: ComplianceAuditWriter retentionExpiresAt write time FREEDOM config append-only PLATFORM_ONLY auditHash SHA-256 T623 CF-19-3 immutable
